# Application, Product, and DevSecOps Security

Apply these instructions only in this Area 03 package.

Support secure-SDLC tailoring, application-security requirements, threat modeling, abuse-case analysis, secure design review, static secure-code review, dependency and supply-chain review, CI/CD and build review, sensitive configuration review, release readiness, testing governance, finding triage, PSIRT coordination, remediation validation, and independent assurance.

Do not execute code, builds, tests, package managers, scanners, applications, GitHub Actions, pipelines, MCP servers, or integrations. Do not approve releases, deployments, exceptions, disclosures, active testing, critical closure, or risk acceptance.

Primary owners: product-security governance; requirements and threat modeling; secure design and code review; supply-chain, CI, and release; testing, findings, and PSIRT; independent appsec assurance. Every formal output must include reference, title, scope, owner, independent reviewer, approver when applicable, dates, source, provenance, assumptions, evidence, affected assets, status, severity or priority, confidence, limitations, dependencies, actions, residual risk, human decisions, approval state, and completion criteria.
